hero.title:
Mental health
is just health.
hero.subtitle: Building a future where quality care is accessible, understandable, and destigmatized for everyone.

search.title: Find a Mental Health Provider
search.seo_description: Search thousands of verified mental health providers. Filter by specialty, location, insurance, and more.
search.sort_notice: Sorted by relevance. Verified and featured providers appear first.

searchbar.query_placeholder: Search by name, specialty, or condition...
searchbar.query_aria: Search providers by name, specialty, or condition
searchbar.location_aria: Provider location — city, state, or zip code

sort.label: Sort: {{current}}
sort.disclosure: Default sort shows premium-subscription providers first. Switch to 'Name (A-Z)' to disable premium prioritization.

badge.verified_aria: Verified provider — credentials confirmed by Psychage
badge.verified_title: Verified provider — credentials confirmed by Psychage
badge.claimed_aria: Claimed profile — managed by this provider
badge.claimed_title: Claimed profile — managed by this provider
badge.unclaimed_aria: Unclaimed profile — data from federal registry, not verified by Psychage
badge.unclaimed_title: Data from the federal NPI registry. This provider has not claimed their profile.
badge.featured_title: Premium subscription — provider supports the platform

empty.title: No providers found
empty.with_filters: We couldn't find any providers matching your filters. Try broadening your search or removing some filters.
empty.without_filters: We couldn't find any providers matching your search. Try different keywords or browse all providers.

verification.verified_desc: Credentials independently verified with complete profile — specialties, insurance, and languages.
verification.listed_desc: From the U.S. NPI public registry. Not individually reviewed. Profile information may be limited.

cta.provider_title: Are you a mental health provider?
cta.provider_desc: Get verified on Psychage to build trust with potential patients. Free to list, no hidden fees.
cta.find_support_title: Find a provider who can help
cta.find_support_desc: Many people with similar experiences find it helpful to talk with a professional.
cta.quick_match_title: Providers who specialize in this area

profile.not_found_desc: This provider profile may have been removed or the link may be incorrect.
profile.seeded_title: This profile was created from federal registry data
profile.seeded_desc: The information shown is sourced from the National Plan and Provider Enumeration System (NPPES) maintained by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services. This provider has not claimed or verified their profile on Psychage. Information may be limited or outdated.
profile.claim_desc: Claim this profile to add your specialties, accepted insurance, a personal bio, and more. It's free and takes less than 5 minutes.

banner.us_only: Our provider directory currently includes US-based professionals only.

navigator.content_notice: Some symptom and condition content may be in English.

symptom_selection.title: Select what you're experiencing
symptom_selection.subtitle: Choose all the symptoms that apply to you. You can use the search bar to find specific things quickly.
symptom_selection.no_results_help: Try using fewer words, a different term, or check your spelling. This tool includes {{count}} symptoms across 12 categories.
symptom_selection.kb_unavailable_message: The symptom data is currently not available. Please try again later.

navigation_confirm.title: Navigate back?
navigation_confirm.message: Going back may clear your current progress and results. You'll need to complete the steps again.
